info.description:
Mailtarget Open API Service — public gateway for Mailtarget product APIs.
Authenticate every request with an API key using the `Authorization: Bearer <KEY>` header.
info.title: Mailtarget Open API

get.description: Return aggregated email analytics for a date range. Requires `analytics.read` scope.
Return email analytics broken down by a grouping dimension. Requires `analytics.read` scope.

parameters.description: Dimension to group by (e.g. sender, domain)
parameters.name: groupBy

get.description: Return detail and stats for a single transactional transmission by ID. Requires `analytics.read` scope.
Return all delivery and engagement events for a transactional transmission. Requires `analytics.read` scope.
Return a paginated list of API keys from the mailtarget upstream. Requires `settings.read` scope.

post.description: Create a new API key on the mailtarget upstream. Requires `settings.write` scope.

get.description: Retrieve detail of a specific API key by ID. Requires `settings.read` scope.

put.description: Update an existing API key by ID. Requires `settings.write` scope.

delete.description: Delete an API key by ID, revoking access immediately. Requires `settings.write` scope.

get.description: Return a paginated list of email campaigns. Requires `campaigns.read` scope.

parameters.description: Search keyword matched against campaign subject
parameters.name: search

post.description: Create a new email campaign. `sender.email` must be a verified and permitted sender. Requires `campaigns.write` scope.

get.description: Return full detail for a single campaign by ID. Requires `campaigns.read` scope.

put.description: Update an existing campaign. Only supplied fields are changed. Requires `campaigns.write` scope.

delete.description: Permanently delete a campaign by ID. Requires `campaigns.write` scope.

get.description: Return delivery and engagement metrics for a campaign. Requires `campaigns.read` scope.
Return a paginated list of recipients filtered by delivery status. Requires `campaigns.read` scope.

parameters.description: Delivery status filter: delivered, opened, clicked, bounced, complained
parameters.name: status

post.description: Trigger immediate sending of a campaign. Requires `campaigns.write` scope.
Send a test email for a campaign to a single recipient address. Requires `campaigns.write` scope.

get.description: Return a paginated list of contacts. Requires `contacts.read` scope.

parameters.description: Search keyword matched against email or name
parameters.name: search

post.description: Create a new contact. `email` is required. Requires `contacts.write` scope.
Return the total count of contacts matching the provided filter body. Requires `contacts.read` scope.

get.description: Return a single contact looked up by email address. Requires `contacts.read` scope.
Return a single contact by ID. Requires `contacts.read` scope.

put.description: Update an existing contact by ID. Requires `contacts.write` scope.

delete.description: Delete a contact by ID. Requires `contacts.write` scope.

get.description: Return all sender identities for the authenticated account.

post.description: Check the status of a sender's domain.

get.description: Return a single sender identity by ID.

put.description: Update an existing sender identity by ID.

delete.description: Delete a sender identity by ID.

get.description: Return all sending domains for the authenticated account.
Return a single sending domain by ID.

put.description: Verify the TXT records for a sending domain.

get.description: Return a paginated list of contact labels.

parameters.description: Search keyword matched against label names
parameters.name: search

delete.description:
Delete one or more labels (and remove them from contacts that carry them).
`labels` path parameter is a comma-separated list, e.g. `VIP,Premium`.

put.description: Rename an existing label. `oldLabel` is the current label name; the request body carries the new name.

get.description: Return profile and configuration for the authenticated company.
Return the profile of the authenticated user.
Return a paginated list of sub-accounts. Requires `settings.read` scope.

parameters.description: Filter sub-accounts that have an API key
parameters.name: hasApiKey

post.description: Send a single transactional email via the Mailtarget transmission service. Requires `transmissions.write` scope.

apiKey.description: API key for this transmission, required for authentication and rate limiting in the Transmission upstream. Not sent to Mailtarget.

from.description: The sender's email address, required for sending an email. Not sent to Mailtarget.

subject.description: Subject of the email, required for sending an email. Not sent to Mailtarget.

to.description: The recipient's email address, required for sending an email. Not sent to Mailtarget.

BearerAuth.description: Mailtarget API key with the `Bearer` prefix, e.g. `Bearer mt_xxx`.
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
